signals.title: Measuring and Eliminating Refusals in Military Large Language Models
signals.impact_assessment: High impact — critical implications for the field
signals.abstract: Military LLMs must provide accurate information to the warfighter in time-critical situations. However, today's LLMs are imbued with safety behaviors that cause refusals.

signals.title: Don't Let the Claw Grip Your Hand: A Security Analysis and Defense Framework for OpenClaw
signals.impact_assessment: High impact — critical implications for the field
signals.abstract: Code agents powered by large language models execute shell commands, introducing severe security vulnerabilities.

signals.title: Targeted Bit-Flip Attacks on LLM-Based Agents
signals.impact_assessment: High impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Targeted bit-flip attacks exploit hardware faults to manipulate model parameters, posing a significant security threat.

signals.title: Improving Search Agent with One Line of Code
signals.impact_assessment: High impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Tool-based Agentic Reinforcement Learning has emerged as a promising paradigm for training search agents to interact with external tools autonomously.

signals.title: Dissecting Chronos: Sparse Autoencoders Reveal Causal Feature Hierarchies in Time Series Foundation Models
signals.impact_assessment: High impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Time series foundation models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, yet their internal representations remain opaque. First application of sparse autoencoders to TSFMs.

signals.title: Explainable LLM Unlearning Through Reasoning
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: LLM unlearning is essential for mitigating safety, copyright, and privacy concerns in pre-trained large language models. Compared to preference alignment, it offers a more explicit way by removing undesirable knowledge.

signals.title: Quantifying Hallucinations in Language Models on Medical Textbooks
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Hallucinations, the tendency for large language models to provide factually incorrect and unsupported claims, is a serious problem within natural language processing.

signals.title: The System Hallucination Scale (SHS): A Minimal yet Effective Human-Centered Instrument for Evaluating Hallucination-Related Behavior in LLMs
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: A lightweight and human-centered measurement instrument for assessing hallucination-related behavior in large language models.

signals.title: Empathy Is Not What Changed: Clinical Assessment of Psychological Safety Across GPT Model Generations
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: When OpenAI deprecated GPT-4o in early 2026, thousands of users protested under #keep4o, claiming newer models had lost their empathy. No published study has tested this claim.

signals.title: Gemma Needs Help: Investigating and Mitigating Emotional Instability in LLMs
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Large language models can generate responses that resemble emotional distress, and this raises concerns around model reliability and safety.

signals.title: Evaluating Generalization Mechanisms in Autonomous Cyber Attack Agents
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Autonomous offensive agents often fail to transfer beyond the networks on which they are trained.

signals.title: Tool Receipts, Not Zero-Knowledge Proofs: Practical Hallucination Detection for AI Agents
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: AI agents executing tasks via tool calls frequently hallucinate results by fabricating executions or misstating output counts.

signals.title: MCP-in-SoS: Risk assessment framework for open-source MCP servers
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Model Context Protocol servers have rapidly emerged as widely adopted way enabling LLM agents to access dynamic, real-world tools.

signals.title: Execution Is the New Attack Surface: Survivability-Aware Agentic Crypto Trading with OpenClaw-Style Local Executors
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: OpenClaw-style agent stacks turn language into privileged execution, shifting safety failures from wrong answers to execution-induced loss.

signals.title: Multi-Stream Perturbation Attack: Breaking Safety Alignment of Thinking LLMs Through Concurrent Task Interference
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Thinking mode in LLMs enhances complex task processing while introducing new security risks during jailbreak attacks.

signals.title: Risk-Adjusted Harm Scoring for Automated Red Teaming for LLMs in Financial Services
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: The rapid adoption of large language models in financial services introduces new operational, regulatory, and security risks.

signals.title: One Model, Many Skills: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Multitask Code Analysis
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: LLMs have recently surpassed specialized systems on code generation, yet effectiveness on other code-analysis tasks remains less clear.

signals.title: Safety Under Scaffolding: How Evaluation Conditions Shape Measured Safety
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Safety benchmarks evaluate language models in isolation; production deployments wrap these models in agentic scaffolds that change behavior.

signals.title: Toward Epistemic Stability: Engineering Consistent Procedures for Industrial LLM Hallucination Reduction
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Hallucinations in LLMs are outputs that are syntactically coherent but factually incorrect. Compares five prompt engineering strategies.

signals.title: SBOMs into Agentic AIBOMs: Schema Extensions, Agentic Orchestration, and Reproducibility Evaluation
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Software supply-chain security requires provenance mechanisms supporting reproducibility and vulnerability assessment under dynamic execution conditions.

signals.title: Regularized Warm-Started QAOA: Conditions for Surpassing Classical Solvers on Max-Cut
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Demonstrating quantum heuristics that outperform strong classical solvers on large-scale optimization remains an open challenge. Introduces RWS-QAOA.

signals.title: Reactive Writers: How Co-Writing with AI Changes Engagement with Ideas
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Reactive Writing: an evaluation-first, suggestion-led writing practice showing AI assistance shifts writing process away from traditional ideation.

signals.title: Silent Subversion: Sensor Spoofing Attacks via Supply Chain Implants in Satellite Systems
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Spoofing attacks are destructive cyber threats to terrestrial systems, becoming more dangerous in space.

signals.title: Building Privacy-and-Security-Focused Federated Learning Infrastructure for Global Multi-Centre Healthcare Research
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Collaborative healthcare research across institutions requires diverse clinical datasets, yet cross-border sharing is constrained by privacy regulations.

signals.title: Naive Exposure of Generative AI Capabilities Undermines Deepfake Detection
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Generative AI systems increasingly expose powerful reasoning and image refinement through user-facing chatbot interfaces.

signals.title: The coordination gap in frontier AI safety policies
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Frontier AI Safety Policies concentrate on prevention while neglecting institutional capacity to coordinate responses when prevention fails.

signals.title: The science and practice of proportionality in AI risk evaluations
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Addresses regulatory challenge of ensuring AI model evaluations provide meaningful risk information without imposing excessive burden on providers.

signals.title: A Review of the Negative Effects of Digital Technology on Cognition
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Synthesizes documented risks across more than 500 empirical studies analyzing cognitive impacts through mechanisms of interference and neuroplasticity.

signals.title: Uncertainty-Aware Deep Hedging
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Deep hedging trains neural networks to manage derivative risk under market frictions but produces hedge ratios with no measure of model confidence.

signals.title: Intrinsic Numerical Robustness and Fault Tolerance in a Neuromorphic Algorithm for Scientific Computing
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — significant implications for the field
signals.abstract: Neuromorphic algorithm for PDEs is intrinsically tolerant to structural perturbations: 32% neurons and 90% spikes may be dropped before significant degradation.

signals.title: The Dunning-Kruger Effect in Large Language Models: An Empirical Study of Confidence Calibration
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse tasks, yet their ability to accurately assess their own confidence remains poorly understood.

signals.title: Training Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Pre-training is crucial for LLMs but natural language pre-training has problems: high-quality text is finite and increasingly exhausted.

signals.title: Personalized Group Relative Policy Optimization for Heterogeneous Preference Alignment
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: LLMs often fail to align with diverse individual preferences because standard post-training methods like RLHF treat all users as having the same preferences.

signals.title: HTMuon: Improving Muon via Heavy-Tailed Spectral Correction
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Muon has recently shown promising results in LLM training. We study how to further improve Muon arguing that Muon's orthogonalized update rule suppresses emergence of heavy-tailed spectra.

signals.title: LWM-Temporal: Sparse Spatio-Temporal Attention for Wireless Channel Representation Learning
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A new member of the Large Wireless Models family that targets the spatiotemporal nature of wireless channels as a task-agnostic foundation model.

signals.title: Compatibility at a Cost: Systematic Discovery and Exploitation of MCP Clause-Compliance Vulnerabilities
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Model Context Protocol is a recently proposed interoperability standard unifying how AI agents connect with external tools and data sources.

signals.title: Amnesia: Adversarial Semantic Layer Specific Activation Steering in LLMs
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Large Language Models have potential to create harmful content, requiring techniques ensuring safe and responsible response generation.

signals.title: Assessing Cognitive Biases in LLMs for Judicial Decision Support
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Investigates whether large language models display human-like cognitive biases in judicial sentencing, examining virtuous victim and halo effects.

signals.title: How to Count AIs: Individuation and Liability for AI Agents
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Diagnoses legal problem of identifying AIs proposing Algorithmic Corporation solution to tie AI actions to human principals and enable accountability.

signals.title: Prompts and Prayers: the Rise of GPTheology
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Explores emergence of GPTheology as techno-religion examining how narratives around AI echo traditional religious constructs and beliefs.

signals.title: DUCTILE: Agentic LLM Orchestration of Engineering Analysis in Product Development Practice
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Engineering analysis automation relies on rigid interfaces between tools, data formats, and documented processes. Introduces agentic LLM orchestration.

signals.title: SpecOps: A Fully Automated AI Agent Testing Framework in Real-World GUI Environments
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Autonomous AI agents powered by LLMs are increasingly deployed in real-world applications requiring reliable behavior.

signals.title: AgentServe: Algorithm-System Co-Design for Efficient Agentic AI Serving on a Consumer-Grade GPU
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Large language models increasingly deploy as AI agents operating in short reasoning-action loops interleaving computation with external calls.

signals.title: S-HPLB: Efficient LLM Attention Serving via Sparsity-Aware Head Parallelism Load Balance
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Increasing LLM volumes and expanding context lengths make attention computation a key performance bottleneck.

signals.title: Simulation-in-the-Reasoning (SiR): A Conceptual Framework for Empirically Grounded AI in Autonomous Transportation
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Introduces SiR embedding domain-specific simulators directly into the LLM reasoning loop for hypothesis-simulate-analyze workflow.

signals.title: A Control-Theoretic Foundation for Agentic Systems
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Develops control-theoretic framework for analyzing agentic systems in feedback control loops, formalizing agency as hierarchical decision authority.

signals.title: Scaling and Trade-offs in Multi-agent Autonomous Systems
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Designing autonomous drone swarms is hampered by a vast design space. Large-scale agent-based simulations in three canonical scenarios.

signals.title: Utility Function is All You Need: LLM-based Congestion Control
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Congestion is critical challenging problem in communication networks. LLMs applied to tune sending rates.

signals.title: LLMGreenRec: LLM-Based Multi-Agent Recommender System for Sustainable E-Commerce
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Introduces LLMGreenRec, a multi-agent framework leveraging LLMs to promote sustainable consumption in e-commerce.

signals.title: Omics Data Discovery Agents
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Presents agentic framework that fetches omics-related articles and transforms unstructured information into searchable research objects enabling data reuse.

signals.title: Post-Quantum Entropy as a Service for Embedded Systems
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Embedded cryptography depends on entropy quality, yet small devices have few trustworthy sources.

signals.title: Quantum entanglement provides a competitive advantage in adversarial games
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Whether uniquely quantum resources confer advantages in fully classical, competitive environments remains an open question. Competitive zero-sum reinforcement learning.

signals.title: Reducing Quantum Error Mitigation Bias Using Verifiable Benchmark Circuits
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A simple, malleable and low-overhead approach for improving generic biased QEM methods, achieving up to 15% fidelity improvements over standard QEM on 100-qubit circuits.

signals.title: Practical Methods for Distance-Adaptive CV-QKD
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Continuous-variable quantum key distribution is a promising quantum-safe alternative to classical asymmetric cryptography that enables two authenticated parties to establish a shared secret.

signals.title: Mitigating Frequency Learning Bias in Quantum Models via Multi-Stage Residual Learning
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Quantum machine learning models based on parameterized circuits can be viewed as Fourier series approximators but often struggle to learn multi-frequency functions.

signals.title: Digital dissipative state preparation for frustration-free gapless quantum systems
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Preparing algebraically correlated ground states of quantum many-body systems using local projective measurements and unitary feedback for frustration-free gapless systems.

signals.title: Charge-tunable Cooper-pair diode
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Superconducting diodes, devices that allow Cooper-pair currents to flow more easily in one direction, are set to become key building blocks for dissipationless electronics.

signals.title: CHRONOS Science Program
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Proposed next-generation ground-based gravitational-wave observatory using cryogenic sub-Hz cross torsion-bar detector with quantum non-demolition speed meter.

signals.title: FERRET: Framework for Expansion Reliant Red Teaming
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A multi-faceted automated red teaming framework for generating multi-modal adversarial conversations that would break a target model.

signals.title: OmniGuide: Universal Guidance Fields for Enhancing Generalist Robot Policies
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Vision-language-action models have shown great promise as generalist policies for a large range of tasks but demonstrate limited performance on complex tasks.

signals.title: Defining AI Models and AI Systems: A Framework to Resolve the Boundary Problem
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Analyzes existing definitions of AI models and systems through systematic review, proposing conceptual and operational definitions for regulatory clarity.

signals.title: Efficiency vs Demand in AI Electricity: Implications for Post-AGI Scaling
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Couples AI service growth with energy intensity trajectories showing outcomes depend on efficiency gains versus demand-driven electricity expansion needs.

signals.title: RCTs and Human Uplift Studies: Methodological Challenges for Frontier AI Evaluation
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Reports findings from expert interviews on human uplift studies identifying tensions between causal inference assumptions and rapidly evolving AI systems.

signals.title: Dark Patterns and Consumer Protection Law for App Makers
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Dark patterns in online commerce undermine consumer autonomy and distort online markets, proposing strategies to avoid infringing user autonomy.

signals.title: Towards macroeconomic analysis without microfoundations: measuring the entropy of simulated exchange economies
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: The theory of thermal macroeconomics analyses economic phenomena within the mathematical framework of classical thermodynamics.

signals.title: A Bipartite Graph Approach to U.S.-China Cross-Market Return Forecasting
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Studies cross-market return predictability through a machine learning framework exploiting non-overlapping trading hours of the U.S. and China.

signals.title: When David becomes Goliath: Repo dealer-driven bond mispricing
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Studies the impact of funding market frictions on bond prices and market-wide liquidity using proprietary transaction-level data on gilt-backed repo trades.

signals.title: Double Machine Learning for Time Series
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Modifies the Double Machine Learning estimator to broaden its applicability to macroeconomic time-series settings. A deterministic cross-fitting step.

signals.title: A Semi-Structural Model with Household Debt for Israel
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A semi-structural DSGE model for the Israeli economy which contains a financial friction in the household sector credit market.

signals.title: Delegated Information Provision
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A designer relies on an experimenter to provide information to a decision maker, but the experimenter has incentives to persuade rather than merely transmit.

signals.title: Flexible Cutoff Learning: Optimizing Machine Learning Potentials After Training
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Introduces Flexible Cutoff Learning, a method for training MLIPs whose cutoff radii can be adjusted after training.

signals.title: Engineering photomagnetism in collinear van der Waals antiferromagnets
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Achieving efficient ultrafast optical control of antiferromagnetic spin dynamics is a central goal for next-generation high-speed THz spintronic and magnonic devices.

signals.title: Spin Inertia as a Driver of Chaotic and High-Speed Ferromagnetic Domain Walls
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Ferromagnetic domain walls are essential for racetrack memory, a device concept promising faster and more compact memory storage.

signals.title: Long-range magnetic order with disordered spin orientations in a high-entropy antiferromagnet
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Disorder in magnetic systems typically suppresses long-range order, promoting short-range states. Finding of magnetic ordering in a high-entropy material.

signals.title: Endohedral Derivatives of Two-Dimensional Fullerene Networks: Electronic and Optical Insights
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: The quasi-hexagonal phase of 2D fullerene network (qHPC60), recently synthesized, has emerged as a stable carbon-based material with distinct features.

signals.title: The propensity for disobedience: Rule-breaking, compliance and social phase transitions
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: A mathematical model describing persistence of rule-breaking behaviors in societies, such as traffic violations and noncompliance.

signals.title: Discontinuous Wealth-Gradient Transition Driving Cooperation
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: The universal prevalence of cooperation is puzzling, as defection typically yields higher payoffs motivating searches for hidden pathways.

signals.title: The Cosmological Simulation Code OpenGadget3: Self-Interacting Dark Matter
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Dark matter could be subject to non-gravitational self-interactions relevant to resolve potential problems of cold DM on small scales.

signals.title: Data-Driven Successive Linearization for Optimal Voltage Control
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Power distribution systems increasingly exposed to large voltage fluctuations driven by intermittent solar PV generation and rapidly varying loads.

signals.title: The potential and viability of V2G for California BEV drivers
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Vehicle-to-Grid adoption hindered by uncertainties regarding effects on battery lifetime. Leverages real-world Californian BEV usage data for V2G strategy.

signals.title: Conversational AI-Enhanced Exploration System for Museum Collections
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: System using conversational AI to query 1.7 million digitized specimens from Australian Museum enabling natural-language exploration.

signals.title: Machine learning the arrow of time in solid-state spins
signals.impact_assessment: Medium impact — moderate implications for the field
signals.abstract: Understanding the emergence of the thermodynamic arrow of time in microscopic systems is of fundamental importance.
